title: 11 Herbal Tinctures to Ease Swollen Feet for Office Workers
description: Ginkgo biloba tinctures may help with swollen feet due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The constituents in ginkgo biloba, such as flavonoids and terpenoids, help reduce swelling and promote blood flow. These properties can help alleviate pain and discomfort associated with swollen feet.  To use ginkgo biloba tinctures for swollen feet, start by cleaning and drying your feet thoroughly.
